svg.text: McCzarny recently pushed numerous updates to
the crater-js game, significantly enhancing
gameplay and visual features. McCzarny
introduced ladder functionality, a trading UI
for buying and selling items, and the ability
to drop inventory items. Character movement
logic was refined with centralized walkability
checks, improved fall detection, and visual
feedback including sprite flipping and idle
animations. McCzarny implemented race-specific
map textures for characters and updated the HUD
with numerical counters, an essence transfer
button, and ability progress displays. The
world generation system was overhauled to a
staged pipeline, allowing for more complex
underground caves with loot and falling
boulders. McCzarny also added diagonal digging
and detailed tooltips for items and abilities.
Technical improvements included a migration to
TypeScript and various code cleanups, along
with preparations for character damage and
death. Visuals were further updated with new
tile textures, icons, and a re-imagined surface
environment. McCzarny also unified character
interface usage and improved mining actions. In
chromium-daily-digest, McCzarny adjusted
workflow schedules to optimize processing times
for daily digest generation.
Generated on: Sun Apr 12 03:20:09 2026
